description.ko: 무중력의 진주빛 대기 속에서 빛과 생명액이 흐르는 유기체적 존재의 리드미컬한 호흡을 심도 있게 묘사합니다.
description.en: A deep dive into the rhythmic respiration of an organic entity, where light and life-fluid flow in a weightless, pearlescent atmosphere.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Pulmonary Bloom.' A colossal, breathing respiratory node composed of #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular filaments. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere, exhaling viscous #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar that flows like rhythmic liquid silk through semi-permeable walls. Macro focus on the semi-permeable translucent textures and complex internal capillary systems of glowing sap. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution.
